creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bsam
Date: Wed Sep 19 14:38:50 2012
New Revision: 304527
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/304527

Log:
  Add trytond_party_vcarddav 2.4.0, tryton Application Platform (Party
  VCardDAV Module).
  
  PR:		ports/171471
  Submitted by:	matthias@petermann.it

Added:
  head/finance/trytond_party_vcarddav/
  head/finance/trytond_party_vcarddav/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_party_vcarddav/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_party_vcarddav/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_party_vcarddav/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/finance/Makefile

Modified: head/finance/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/finance/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 14:37:45 2012	(r304526)
+++ head/finance/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 14:38:50 2012	(r304527)
@@ -130,6 +130,7 @@
     SUBDIR += trytond_ldap_connection
     SUBDIR += trytond_party
     SUBDIR += trytond_party_siret
+    SUBDIR += trytond_party_vcarddav
     SUBDIR += trytond_product
     SUBDIR += trytond_product_cost_fifo
     SUBDIR += trytond_product_cost_history

Added: head/finance/trytond_party_vcarddav/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_party_vcarddav/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 14:38:50 2012	(r304527)
@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+# Created by: Matthias Petermann<matthias@petermann.it>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	trytond_party_vcarddav
+PORTVERSION=	2.4.0
+CATEGORIES=	finance python
+MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads2.tryton.org/${PORTVERSION:R}/
+
+MAINTAINER=	matthias@petermann.it
+COMMENT=	Tryton Application Platform (Party VCardDAV Module)
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	trytond>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond \
+		trytond_party>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_party \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}vobject>=0.8.1:${PORTSDIR}/deskutils/py-vobject \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}PyWebDAV>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-pywebdav
+
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/finance/trytond_party_vcarddav/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_party_vcarddav/distinfo	Wed Sep 19 14:38:50 2012	(r304527)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (trytond_party_vcarddav-2.4.0.tar.gz) = 4785a9b77390093eb3ae7b85448e53a072cc8383c1bb1f7e79e72705f2b65151
+SIZE (trytond_party_vcarddav-2.4.0.tar.gz) = 23359

Added: head/finance/trytond_party_vcarddav/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_party_vcarddav/pkg-descr	Wed Sep 19 14:38:50 2012	(r304527)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+This port adds the Party VCardDAV Module to the Tryton Application Platform.
+
+WWW: http://www.tryton.org/

Added: head/finance/trytond_party_vcarddav/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
